title: Reframe opening framing: this is not always pre-submission
description: Lines 5-6 were copied from UPSTREAM unchanged: 'You are doing a deep pre-submission code review. Your audience is the author, before they submit.' A LANG-DESIGN review may not be pre-submission at all — it can be applied to an existing API, a library in production, or a design proposal. The framing needs to describe what this mode is for: API design critique, not patch review. Fix: state clearly what artifact is being reviewed (a library API surface, a language feature interface, a design doc) and who the audience is.
close_reason: All four PROMPT-review-lang.md fixes applied in one pass.
